plugins.name: family-pack
plugins.description: A cast of desi family-member code-analysis agents built on auk. Slash commands: /family-pack:buaji (issue finder), /family-pack:padosi (secrets scanner), /family-pack:chachaji (token/cost guardian), /family-pack:family (the starter trio). Deterministic engine; Hinglish is a render skin (use --professional to strip it).
